title: DE11 9EN, R&P Clean Power Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/LP3327SK/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: R&P Clean Power Limited   Installation name: Swadlincote Energy Recovery Facility   Permit number: EPR/LP3327SK/A001   "
